problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: If Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
